word: H3235 - יָמַר - yâmar - yaw-mar' - Boast selves

sections.paragraph:
Original: ימר

Transliteration: yâmar

Phonetic: yaw-mar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to exchange
    1. (Hiphil) to exchange
    2. (Hithpael) to enter into, be changed into
  2. (TWOT) to promise

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 118

Part(s) of speech: Verb
